claim_boundary: The decomposition is exact for the registered bridge class. It shows which part of the certificate survives infinite reference data under that model; it does not estimate how often adversarial residual laws occur naturally.
name: MOSAIC residual-sharpness census v1

protocol.design_case: BiasBios seed 1200 was inspected while designing this analysis; the remaining 34 jobs form the untouched deterministic census
estimands: exact bridge-class worst conditional task-error upper bound
protocol.jobs: all 35 frozen primary MOSAIC deployments from BiasBios-Clinical and ACS-geographic

modes.full: registered radii and registered residual budgets
modes.population_common: zero radii and zero residual budgets
modes.zero_radius: zero radii and registered residual budgets
modes.zero_residual: registered radii and zero residual budgets

protocol.primary_comparison: full minus zero_radius is the removable finite-sample increment; zero_radius minus population_common is the infinite-sample residual-shift increment
